mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tutor_appointment (parent_id, tutor_id, parent_job_posting_id, tutor_job_posting_id, title, subject_id, class_mode, city, address, start_time, duration_minutes, status, created_by, room_id, proposed_start_time, proposed_by, cancel_by, remark) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{tutorId}, #{parentJobPostingId}, #{tutorJobPostingId}, #{title}, #{subjectId}, #{classMode}, #{city}, #{address}, #{startTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{roomId}, #{proposedStartTime}, #{proposedBy}, #{cancelBy}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, tutor_id, parent_job_posting_id, tutor_job_posting_id, title, subject_id, class_mode, city, address, start_time, duration_minutes, status, created_by, room_id, proposed_start_time, proposed_by, cancel_by, remark, create_time, update_time FROM tutor_appointment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tutor_appointment SET status = 2, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE tutor_appointment SET status = 6, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE tutor_appointment SET start_time = proposed_start_time, proposed_start_time = NULL, proposed_by = NULL, status = 2, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, parent_id, tutor_id, parent_job_posting_id, tutor_job_posting_id, title, subject_id, class_mode, city, address, start_time, duration_minutes, status, created_by, room_id, proposed_start_time, proposed_by, cancel_by, remark, create_time, update_time FROM tutor_appointment WHERE (parent_id = #{uid} OR tutor_id = #{uid}) AND start_time < #{end} AND DATE_ADD(start_time, INTERVAL duration_minutes MINUTE) > #{start} AND status IN
(1, 2, 3, 5)
(2, 3, 5)
ORDER BY start_time ASC, id ASC
